sectionNote: No agency menu with forty line items. Four disciplines, one brain across the whole pipeline, so nothing gets lost between the script, the edit, and the strategy.

items.title: Short-form editing
items.description: Reels, TikToks and Shorts engineered for retention: hooks in the first second, pattern interrupts, kinetic captions, sound design that holds the scroll.

items.title: Long-form editing
items.description: YouTube videos, podcasts and docu-style brand films with cinematic pacing and structure. Built to keep average watch time up, not just look expensive.

items.title: Ads & email creatives
items.description: Direct-response video ads, VSLs and email campaign assets built around one metric: conversions. Hook, proof, offer. No wasted frames.

items.title: Scriptwriting & strategy
items.description: Original scripts, hooks and content calendars that give every edit a job to do. AI-assisted where it wins, human where it matters.
